questions.text: Which of these is an asexual mode of reproduction?
questions.explanation: Fission is an asexual reproduction method where a single organism divides into two. Fertilization and pollination are sexual processes.

questions.text: Human sperm is produced in testes.
questions.explanation: Testes (testicles) are the male reproductive organs that produce sperm and testosterone.

questions.correctAnswer: The fusion of male and female gametes to form a zygote.
questions.explanation: Fertilization is the process where sperm and egg fuse to form a zygote, which develops into an embryo.

questions.text: The female reproductive part of a flower is called ________.
questions.explanation: The pistil (or carpel) is the female reproductive part of a flower. It consists of stigma, style, and ovary.
